actor_claims.actor_label: the person or entity making such acquisition proposal
actor_claims.quote_text: the person or entity making such acquisition proposal

event_claims.description: Penford agreed, subject to exceptions, not to solicit or facilitate acquisition proposals.
event_claims.quote_text: Subject to certain exceptions, Penford has agreed that it will not, and it will cause its subsidiaries and their respective directors, officers, employees, investment bankers, financial advisors, attorneys, accountants or other advisors, agents and representatives not to, directly or indirectly:

event_claims.description: Penford agreed not to entertain, solicit, initiate, encourage, induce or facilitate inquiries, proposals or offers that constitute or could lead to an acquisition proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: entertain, solicit, initiate, or knowingly encourage or knowingly induce or knowingly facilitate the making, submission or announcement of any inquiries or the making of any proposal or offer constituting, or that could reasonably be expected to lead to, an “acquisition proposal”

event_claims.description: Penford agreed not to furnish non-public information in connection with an acquisition proposal or a proposal, inquiry or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: furnish any non-public information regarding us or our subsidiaries to any person in connection with, or in response to, an acquisition proposal or any proposal, inquiry or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal;

event_claims.description: Penford agreed not to engage in discussions or negotiations relating to acquisition proposals or related proposals, inquiries or offers.
event_claims.quote_text: engage in discussions or negotiations relating to any acquisition proposal or any proposal, inquiry or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal;

event_claims.description: Penford agreed not to approve, endorse or recommend any acquisition proposal or related proposal, inquiry or offer.
event_claims.quote_text: approve, endorse or recommend any acquisition proposal or any proposal, inquiry or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal;

event_claims.description: Penford may furnish information about itself and its subsidiaries to a person or entity making a qualifying acquisition proposal under a customary confidentiality agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: furnish information about us and our subsidiaries to the person or entity making such acquisition proposal pursuant to a customary confidentiality agreement on terms no less favorable to Penford than those contained in our confidentiality agreement with Ingredion

event_claims.description: Penford may participate in discussions and negotiations regarding a qualifying acquisition proposal with the person making that proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: participate in discussions and negotiations regarding such acquisition proposal with the person making such acquisition proposal.

event_claims.description: Penford must advise Ingredion in writing within 24 hours after receipt of any acquisition proposal or inquiry, proposal or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal before completion of the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: Penford must within 24 hours advise Ingredion in writing of the receipt of any acquisition proposal or any inquiry, proposal or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal

event_claims.description: Penford's board may change its recommendation with respect to a bona fide superior proposal before shareholder approval.
event_claims.quote_text: our board may make a change of recommendation with respect to such superior proposal;

event_claims.description: Penford's board may terminate the merger agreement to enter into an acquisition agreement for a superior proposal, subject to a termination fee.
event_claims.quote_text: the board may terminate the merger agreement to enter into an acquisition agreement with respect to such superior proposal

event_claims.description: Penford must give Ingredion five business days to submit a subsequent proposal and negotiate in good faith with Ingredion and its representatives before changing recommendation or terminating for a superior proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: Penford must provide Ingredion with five business days to submit a subsequent proposal, during which time Penford will negotiate in good faith with Ingredion and its representatives

event_claims.description: Penford may terminate the merger agreement before shareholder approval in order to enter into a definitive agreement for a superior proposal if it complies with non-solicitation obligations and pays the termination fee.
event_claims.quote_text: in order to enter into a definitive agreement to effect a superior proposal, prior to approval of the merger agreement at the special meeting, if Penford has complied with its non-solicitation and related obligations under the merger agreement

event_claims.description: Ingredion may terminate the merger agreement if Penford's board changes recommendation, approves or recommends another acquisition proposal, fails to reaffirm its recommendation, omits or changes recommendation disclosures, or fails to recommend against a competing offer.
event_claims.quote_text: if Penford’s board (a) effects or permits a change of recommendation (whether or not permitted to do so under the merger agreement), (b) approves, endorses or recommends an acquisition proposal to Penford shareholders other than the merger, (c) fails to publicly reaffirm its recommendation of the merger agreement within three business days following receipt of a written request by Ingredion to provide such reaffirmation following the public announcement of an acquisition proposal, (d) fails to include the recommendation to approve the merger or its determination that the merger agreement, the voting and support agreement, the merger and other transactions contemplated thereby are advisable and in the best interest of Penford and its shareholders in this proxy statement, or includes in the proxy statement a proposal or vote upon any other acquisition proposal or (e) fails to recommend against a competing offer for 10% or more of the outstanding capital stock of Penford within 10 business days of the commencement of such an offer

event_claims.description: Ingredion may terminate the merger agreement if Penford materially breaches its non-solicitation obligations regarding an acquisition proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: if Penford materially breaches its non-solicitation obligations regarding an acquisition proposal;
